negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_043
prompt: A close-up shot captures the dynamic operation of a lathe machine in a workshop setting, focusing on a large, metallic cylindrical workpiece spinning rapidly. The surface of the workpiece exhibits grooves and slight wear from the machining process. To the left, a metal fixture holds several bolts and nuts, securing the workpiece in place. The background reveals parts of the workshop, including a brick wall and scattered tools, emphasizing an industrial environment. The lighting is subdued, casting shadows that highlight the metallic surfaces and the motion of the spinning workpiece. The video maintains a steady focus on the lathe's operation, with no new objects appearing and minimal changes in the scene's composition or the workpiece's condition.
